caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" across the chest sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. He is speaking into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him, a white mannequin wears a white garment, and various clothing items hang on racks. The walls are decorated with several framed photographs. On-screen logos include "DASH" and "REALLY TOT" in the lower corners. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his head and facial expressions as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static.
